column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `legal/eu/ehds` extension <-> ISO/IEC 27701:2019 (PIMS) alignment for the European Health Data Space (EHDS). LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) connecting EHDS roles (HealthDataHolder/User/AccessBody), electronic health-data categories (EHR/PatientSummary/Prescription/medical-device data), and secondary-use & access-application concepts to ISO 27701 PII controller/processor stakeholder clauses and access/consent/transfer controls. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.

column5: Records of PII disclosure to third parties
